summary: Completed Phase A architecture testing for DressApp. Tested regression functionality, new FashionCLIP embedding service, closet search endpoints, and frontend camera/upload UI. Most features working correctly with minor issues identified.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Multi=true returns single item instead of items array in some cases
flaky_endpoints.impact: Frontend expects items array but gets single item response

minor_issues.issue: FashionCLIP embedding fails with very small (1x1 pixel) images
minor_issues.impact: Embedding not created for tiny test images, works fine with real images

passed_tests: POST /api/v1/closet/analyze with multi=false (single analysis) - Gemini model working
POST /api/v1/closet with image_base64 creates items with 201 status
POST /api/v1/closet persists clip_embedding (512-d) and clip_model when using proper RGB images
GET /api/v1/closet strips clip_embedding from list payload to keep it lightweight
POST /api/v1/closet/search with text query returns sorted results by _score DESC
POST /api/v1/closet/search authentication (401 without token, 400 with missing fields)
POST /api/v1/closet/search honors min_score and limit parameters
Frontend /closet/add page renders both 'Take photo' and 'Upload photos' buttons
Frontend camera input has capture='environment' for rear camera on mobile
Frontend mobile viewport (390x844) displays buttons and layout cleanly
Frontend responsive design works well on both desktop and mobile viewports

success_percentage.backend: 85% - Most Phase A features working, minor issues with analyze multi=true and tiny image handling
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - UI elements present and working, responsive design good, upload flow needs session persistence testing

action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix POST /api/v1/closet/analyze multi=true to consistently return items array format. 2. Improve FashionCLIP error handling for edge case images. 3. Consider session persistence improvements for long upload/analyze flows.
